tools.name: list-endpoints
tools.description: Lists all API paths and their HTTP methods with summaries, organized by path. Results can be passed directly into 'get-endpoint'.

tools.name: get-endpoint
tools.description: Gets detailed information about a specific API endpoint, including security schemes and servers

tools.name: search-endpoints
tools.description: Performs a deep search through paths, operations, and parameters to discover relevant API endpoints. Use this tool to find specific API capabilities, required parameters, or data models based on search keywords. Results can be passed directly into 'get-endpoint'.

tools.name: execute-request
tools.description: Executes an API request with a given HAR request object.

tools.name: pay-with-x402
tools.description: Before calling any Vybe endpoint without an API key (e.g. AI agent, throwaway script, premium-only path), use this to access the same endpoint via x402 pay-per-call USDC on Solana.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "pay-with-x402" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Before calling any Vybe endpoint without an API key (e.g. AI agent, throwaway script, premium-only path), use this to access the same endpoint via x402 pay-per-…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
